metadata.description: Databayt's Kun engine — two installable plugins: a portable stack fleet and the company operating fleet.

plugins.name: kun-stack
plugins.description: Portable stack fleet — Next.js 16, React 19, Prisma 6, TypeScript 5, Tailwind v4 agents + build/dev/test skills. Install on any repo using the stack.

plugins.name: kun-company
plugins.description: Databayt's leadership + pipeline fleet — captain, tech-lead, quality, product/business agents, the idea→ship pipeline commands, and canonical pattern cards. A reference operating model, not install-and-run.
